name: send_slack_message
description: Sends a Slack message. This tool provides comprehensive messaging capabilities for the Slack platform and allows users to send messages to channels or direct message conversations. The tool supports various message formats and integrates with Slack's messaging infrastructure to provide reliable message delivery across different workspace configurations and channel types.
